description: The BMW M3, produced in various generations since 1986, is BMW's iconic high-performance compact sports car. From the E30's motorsport-bred four-cylinder to the E46's legendary inline-six, the E90/E92's screaming V8, and the F80/G80's twin-turbo six, each generation has defined its era. The E46 CSL, E92 GTS, and manual-gearbox examples are the most collectible variants.
